font_family.import_instruction: Import Outfit and Manrope from Google Fonts in index.html or global css

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Ultra-minimal bento grids with generous whitespace. Focus on data clarity and conversion.
spacing_and_layout.dashboards: Strict grid hierarchy, dense and compact. 1px solid border-slate-200, no drop-shadows by default. Flat-rectangular components.
spacing_and_layout.mobile_first: Always stack content on mobile using grid-cols-1, expand on md and lg breakpoints.

components.hero_section: Massive typography with a white background. Central bento-style search bar for Freight Search.
components.freight_search_bar: Inputs for Pickup Location, Delivery Location, Weight, Parcel Type, Transport Mode. Prominent blue-600 'Search' button. Must be highly visible above the fold.
components.blurred_listings: Public view courier cards. Content inside pricing/contact divs MUST have 'blur-md select-none' with a clear 'Log in to view actual rates' overlay CTA to drive B2B signups.
components.lead_generation_modal: Shadcn Dialog. Includes a 60-min SLA countdown timer (red text when < 15 mins).
components.dashboard_cards: Flat white background, border-slate-200, no shadow. Crisp edges.

hero_background.description: Cargo containers at port - use as subtle background or in a bento feature box

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the ultra-minimal Swiss style: Stark white backgrounds, subtle slate borders, electric blue primary color.
Implement 3 distinct Dashboard Layouts (Business, Courier, Admin).
Build the public landing page with a hero freight search calculator and 'blurred' listings to drive B2B signups (key differentiator).
Implement Freight Calculator logic (base + fuel + handling + insurance + GST).
Use 'Outfit' for all headings and 'Manrope' for body text. Do NOT use Inter for headings.
CRITICAL: Add 'data-testid' to ALL interactive elements (buttons, form inputs, links, tabs, modals) for automated testing.
Implement dual registration flows (Business vs Courier) with OTP verification mocked.
Never use raw transparent backgrounds over images for text areas; use glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70) or opaque blocks.
For the dashboards, favor dense information architecture, flat white cards with border-slate-200, avoiding heavy Vercel-like card shadows.
Include Trust signals: Verified Companies, Fast Delivery Network, Trusted Logistics Partners in the landing page.
